issues.description: Marked as unresolved but is a specific container (Lava Maze muddy chest), not an item to carry. Should be removed from unresolvedItems or properly resolved.
Currently 'tbd'. Should document: mithril ore, ankou kill, bloodveld kill requirements. GP stack (19.7m) already provided.

notes: Quest mapping is accurate: Mage Arena I & II are explicitly required, WILDERNESS_HARD aligns with Wilderness Agility course requirement
Item tracking is solid: Muddy key correctly identified with source='content'
Abstract items are genuine and necessary: god protection gear (for GWD) and high alch reference (Mage Arena II staff)
Step text is clear and well-structured with distinct sub-tasks
Pandemonium context note: This step is part of the broader quest chain progression and does not directly reference Pandemonium quest
